---
title: ""
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents:
    - ../posts/*/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  include:
    categories: "code-explorations"
format:
  html:
    css: ../assets/css/styles.css
---

::: {.content-container}
# Code Explorations

::: {.section-description}
Deep dives into programming concepts, algorithms, and software design patterns.
:::

::: {#listing}
:::
:::
